mapper.sql: subject_phone, subject_name, subject_gender, subject_age, glasses_mac, username, start_time, duration, frequency, light_brightness, sound_volume, sync_brightness, sync_volume
mapper.insert: insert into time_data (subject_phone, subject_name, subject_gender, subject_age, glasses_mac, username, start_time, duration, frequency, light_brightness, sound_volume, sync_brightness, sync_volume) values (#{timeData.subjectPhone}, #{timeData.subjectName}, #{timeData.subjectGender}, #{timeData.subjectAge}, #{timeData.glassesMac}, #{timeData.username}, #{timeData.startTime}, #{timeData.duration}, #{timeData.frequency}, #{timeData.lightBrightness}, #{timeData.soundVolume}, #{timeData.syncBrightness}, #{timeData.syncVolume})
